glosses.ja: 名人; チャンピオン

sentences.target: Der Meister schaut sich die Küche an.
sentences.reading: /deːɐ̯ ˈmaɪ̯stɐ ʃaʊ̯t zɪç diː ˈkʏçə an/

translations.de: Der Meister schaut sich die Küche an.
translations.ipa: /deːɐ̯ ˈmaɪ̯stɐ ʃaʊ̯t zɪç diː ˈkʏçə an/
translations.pt: O mestre de obras inspeciona a cozinha.
translations.vi: Thợ cả kiểm tra nhà bếp.
translations.hi: फोरमैन रसोई की जाँच करता है.
translations.ja: 現場監督がキッチンを点検する。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; nominative masculine singular; marks the subject NP.
Head noun of the subject; nominative singular.
Finite main verb (3rd person singular present); part of the separable verb 'anschauen'.
Reflexive pronoun (accusative); required by the verb pattern 'sich etwas anschauen'; coreferential with the subject.
Definite article; accusative feminine singular; marks the direct object NP.
Head noun of the direct object; accusative singular; thing being looked at.
Separable particle; combines with 'schaut' to form 'anschauen'; placed in clause-final position.

sentences.target: Wir fragen den Meister wegen der Heizung.
sentences.reading: /viːɐ̯ ˈfʁaːɡən deːn ˈmaɪ̯stɐ ˈveːɡən deːɐ̯ ˈhaɪ̯tsʊŋ/

translations.de: Wir fragen den Meister wegen der Heizung.
translations.ipa: /viːɐ̯ ˈfʁaːɡən deːn ˈmaɪ̯stɐ ˈveːɡən deːɐ̯ ˈhaɪ̯tsʊŋ/
translations.en: We’re asking the foreman about the heating.
translations.es: Le preguntamos al capataz sobre la calefacción.
translations.fr: Nous interrogeons le contremaître sur le chauffage.
translations.ko: 우리는 난방에 대해 현장 감독에게 물어본다.
translations.pt: Perguntamos ao mestre de obras sobre o aquecimento.
translations.he: אנחנו שואלים את מנהל העבודה על החימום.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi hỏi thợ cả về hệ thống sưởi.
translations.nl: We vragen de voorman naar de verwarming.
translations.hi: हम फोरमैन से हीटिंग के बारे में पूछ रहे हैं.
translations.el: Ρωτάμε τον εργοδηγό για τη θέρμανση.
translations.id: Kami bertanya kepada mandor tentang pemanas.
translations.ro: Îl întrebăm pe maistru despre încălzire.
translations.ja: 暖房について現場監督に聞いています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; nominative plural; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb (1st person plural present).
Definite article; accusative masculine singular; marks the direct object NP.
Head noun of the direct object; the person being asked.
Preposition governing the genitive; introduces a reason/topic phrase.
Definite article; genitive feminine singular after 'wegen'.
Head noun of the prepositional complement; genitive singular; the matter/reason in question.

sentences.target: Mein Onkel ist Meister im Fliesenlegen.

translations.de: Mein Onkel ist Meister im Fliesenlegen.
translations.en: My uncle is a master at tiling.
translations.es: Mi tío es un maestro en colocar azulejos.
translations.fr: Mon oncle est un expert dans la pose de carrelage.
translations.it: Mio zio è un maestro nella posa delle piastrelle.
translations.zh-Hans: 我叔叔是铺瓷砖的高手。
translations.yue: 我叔叔係鋪瓷磚嘅高手。
translations.ru: Мой дядя мастер по укладке плитки.
translations.pt: Meu tio é mestre em colocar azulejos.
translations.vi: Chú tôi rất giỏi lát gạch.
translations.nl: Mijn oom is een meester in het tegelen.
translations.uk: Мій дядько майстер з укладання плитки.
translations.hi: मेरे चाचा टाइल लगाने में माहिर हैं.
translations.pl: Mój wujek jest mistrzem w układaniu płytek.
translations.el: Ο θείος μου είναι μάστορας στα πλακάκια.
translations.nb: Onkelen min er en mester på flislegging.
translations.sv: Min farbror är en mästare på att lägga kakel.
translations.ro: Unchiul meu este maestru la montat gresie.
translations.cs: Můj strýc je mistr v pokládání dlažby.
translations.da: Min onkel er en mester til at lægge fliser.
translations.ja: 叔父はタイル張りの名人です。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner; nominative masculine singular; modifies the subject noun.
Head noun of the subject; nominative singular.
Copular auxiliary (3rd person singular present); links subject to predicate nominal.
Predicate noun (predicative complement); nominative singular; denotes the subject's status.
Preposition (contraction of 'in' + 'dem'); introduces a dative prepositional phrase indicating field/domain.
Head noun of the prepositional complement; dative singular after 'im'; denotes the field (tiling).

sentences.target: Der Verein wurde endlich Meister in Berlin.
sentences.reading: /deːɐ̯ fɛʁˈaɪ̯n ˈvʊʁdə ˈɛntlɪç ˈmaɪ̯stɐ ɪn bɛʁˈliːn/

translations.de: Der Verein wurde endlich Meister in Berlin.
translations.ipa: /deːɐ̯ fɛʁˈaɪ̯n ˈvʊʁdə ˈɛntlɪç ˈmaɪ̯stɐ ɪn bɛʁˈliːn/
translations.en: The club finally became champions in Berlin.
translations.es: El club por fin se coronó campeón en Berlín.
translations.fr: Le club est enfin devenu champion à Berlin.
translations.it: Il club è finalmente diventato campione a Berlino.
translations.zh-Hans: 俱乐部终于在柏林夺冠了。
translations.yue: 嗰間球會終於喺柏林奪冠。
translations.ru: Клуб наконец стал чемпионом в Берлине.
translations.pt: O clube finalmente foi campeão em Berlim.
translations.he: המועדון סוף סוף זכה באליפות בברלין.
translations.vi: Câu lạc bộ cuối cùng भी vô địch ở Berlin.
translations.ar: النادي أخيرًا أصبح بطلًا في برلين.
translations.nl: De club werd eindelijk kampioen in Berlijn.
translations.uk: Клуб нарешті став чемпіоном у Берліні.
translations.hu: A klub végre bajnok lett Berlinben.
translations.hi: क्लब आखिरकार बर्लिन में चैंपियन बना.
translations.pl: Klub wreszcie został mistrzem w Berlinie.
translations.el: Ο σύλλογος έγινε επιτέλους πρωταθλητής στο Βερολίνο.
translations.nb: Klubben ble endelig mester i Berlin.
translations.id: Klub itu akhirnya jadi juara di Berlin.
translations.sv: Klubben blev äntligen mästare i Berlin.
translations.ro: Clubul a devenit în sfârșit campion la Berlin.
translations.cs: Klub se konečně stal mistrem v Berlíně.
translations.da: Klubben blev endelig mestre i Berlin.
translations.ja: クラブはついにベルリンで優勝した。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; nominative masculine singular; marks the subject NP.
Head noun of the subject; nominative singular.
Copular auxiliary (preterite); marks change of state with a predicate nominal.
Sentence adverb; expresses speaker attitude/time nuance.
Predicate noun (resulting status); nominative singular after copula.
Preposition introducing a locative prepositional phrase.
Proper noun; object of the preposition; location of becoming champion.
